name: SAS Visual Analytics
description: Self-service business intelligence and advanced visual exploration platform that combines interactive dashboards, natural language queries, automated insights, and predictive analytics in one governed environment.
elevatorPitch: Self-service BI and advanced exploration — dashboards, reports, and predictive analytics in one governed platform.
capabilities: Interactive dashboards with drill-down and cross-filtering
Natural Language Query (NLQ) — ask questions in plain English
Advanced data exploration with statistical analysis
Governed self-service with role-based access control
Integration with SAS Viya analytics for predictive visualizations
targetBuyer: Chief Data Officer, Head of Business Intelligence, CFO, Head of Strategy
phUseCases: Executive risk dashboards for bank boards
